§6Aluminium Processing§f covers extraction and refining of aluminum.

§eProcess:§f
• Bauxite ore → Alumina → Aluminum
• Electrolytic reduction
• Industrial-scale production

§eUses:§f
• Lightweight alloys
• Electrical conductors
• Industrial components

§aTip:§f Set up efficient aluminum production - widely used material.
